steps.title: Define the needed verb
steps.content: The fossils help scientists not only fill in steps in hominid evolution but also illuminate the Pleistocene generally. The blank needs a verb about recognizing or making sense of evolutionary steps through evidence.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched verbs
steps.content: A means to use something for advantage, not to identify it. B means to produce or give way, not to analyze. C means to rank by importance. The remaining verb means to detect or recognize through careful study. The answer is D.
